prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWC-LEATHERBADGEHOLDER-BLACK Product Type: BADGE_HOLDER Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal 2 in 1 Leather ID Badge Holder Police Gear with Lanyard Neck Chain, Black Description: The ASR Federal Security Leather Neck Lanyard ID and Police Badge Holder is compact ID card holder and police badge holder in one. On one side, a compartment with a clear window to house important identification credentials and other cards if needed; flip it over and you'll find a secure pin-back badge mounting surface to keep your police badge secure. Together, the ASR Federal Leather Double Sided Police ID Badge Holder with Lanyard Neck Chain keeps your most valuable pieces of professional ID conveniently in one location.

If you have a physically demanding field job or work in high intensity operative or crisis situations, having a reliable police badge and ID holder to protect and conceal your most valuable pieces of identification is paramount. The identification and police badge holder is ideal for those public or private security professionals who are regularly on the move, or require discretion for sensitive or covert situations.

Made from 100% genuine leather, the lanyard ID and police badge holder can be carried in pocket or around neck by a (included but removable) comfortable beaded neck chain. This badge holder is constructed and meant to withstand heavy duty, everyday use; high quality genuine leather and reinforced stitching make this badge holder lightweight, highly durable and able to withstand rough and demanding conditions.

The ASR Federal police badge and ID holder will give you the peace of mind knowing that your professional credentials are right where they're supposed to be and easily accessible when needed for display. Search Terms: Police gear on duty ID credential holder case badge wallet neck chain FBI shield identification leather mens wallets department issue universal badge holder id lanyard law enforcement supplies Features: - 2 IN 1 POLICE GEAR SECURITY ESSENTIAL: The ASR Federal double-sided ID and badge holder is ideal for police, law enforcement and other public or private security professionals; the 2 in 1 ID badge holder is a lightweight alternative to a full sized badge wallet and is comfortable to wear on person with lanyard - POLICE BADGE AND ID CARD HOLDER: Featuring a clear window to protect your ID and cards on one side and secure badge mounting on the other, the 2 in 1 police ID badge holder keeps important pieces of identification safe and accessible; included is a removable sturdy beaded neck chain lanyard - QUALITY LEATHER: This badge holder boasts a strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather; the police equipment badge holder with lanyard will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will always maintain its quality construction - COMPACT DESIGN: The police equipment badge holder and ID card holder features a purposeful low profile, minimal and compact design without any unnecessary bulk, making it easy to wear, carry, store and travel with - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 x 3 inches; Color: Black with clear ID windows; Neck Chain Dimensions: 12 inches in length from neck to chest (detachable); ID Holder Material: Leather === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
